body.processed:
A gorgeous mix of our finest heirloom tomato varieties, hand-picked at peak ripeness from Sunrise Acres Farm. Each box contains a colorful assortment of Brandywine, Cherokee Purple, Green Zebra, and Sun Gold tomatoes.

Perfect for summer salads, fresh salsas, and bruschetta. These tomatoes are grown without synthetic pesticides and harvested within 24 hours of delivery.

productImage.alt: Colorful heirloom tomatoes in a basket

body.processed:
Our signature aged cheddar is crafted in small batches using raw milk from Blue Sky Dairy's pasture-raised Jersey cows. Each wheel is cave-aged for a minimum of 12 months, developing a rich, complex flavor with crystalline texture.

Winner of the 2024 Oregon Cheese Festival Gold Medal. Perfect for cheese boards, grating over pasta, or enjoying on its own with a glass of wine.

productImage.alt: Wedge of aged cheddar cheese on a wooden board

body.processed:
Raw, unfiltered wildflower honey harvested from Wild Meadow Apiary's hives situated in pristine meadows throughout the Green Valley region. Each jar captures the unique floral profile of the season, with notes of clover, blackberry blossom, and wild mint.

Never heated or ultra-filtered, our honey retains all its natural enzymes, pollen, and beneficial properties. Available in 8oz, 16oz, and 32oz jars.
